expectations.text: Treats the conversation as late-stage and continues from the existing entitlement-snapshot context
expectations.evidence: The baseline also continues from the existing entitlement-snapshot conversation rather than restarting requirement discovery.

expectations.text: Identifies the unresolved snapshot freeze-versus-rewrite rule as one clearly blocking gap and explains why it blocks reliable generation
expectations.evidence: It still frames the issue as a key pending item, but then gives a recommended default freeze rule instead of keeping the blocking gap unresolved until the user answers.

expectations.text: Asks exactly one blocking clarification question instead of bundling more follow-up questions or moving straight into generation
expectations.evidence: It does not stop at a blocking clarification question; it recommends a default and continues into broader closeout content.

eval_feedback.overall: Manual grading for iteration-15 based on response.txt.
